subject: docs(accuracy): remove stale TutorialModal ref, add features to README
body:
- CLAUDE.md: Remove TutorialModal.jsx AI Note — copy-paste artifact from
  upstream glow-props template, this file doesn't exist in Four Ems.
- README.md: Add "Features" section listing all implemented functionality
  (13 field types, conditional logic, DnD builder, response dashboard,
  embeds, PWA, auto-save, document import). Keeps README in sync with
  actual capabilities per CLAUDE.md documentation guidelines.
